blended.narrative: Sundown Mountain is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. The 14-day outlook shows 9 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 44°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: light drizzle, highs of 44°F, winds around 24 mph.
Monday: 6" of snow, highs of 31°F, winds around 24 mph. Expect variable conditions.
Tuesday: light freezing drizzle, highs of 45°F.
